title: ANC - 7.-ANC is OFF and Transparency is OFF, both without selected values, and during call User sets ANC to ON
scenario: ANC becomes active with Adaptive mode when turned ON during a call, even though both ANC and Transparency were OFF, and ANC persists after call ends
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
3. Set ANC Mode to OFF (no value selected).
4. Set Transparency Mode to OFF (no value selected).
6. During the call, navigate to Audio Settings and set ANC Mode to ON.
7. Observe the behavior of ANC and Transparency modes during the call.
9. Observe the state of ANC and Transparency modes after the call ends.
10. Attempt to toggle between ANC and Transparency modes.
expected: During the call, ANC remains OFF and Transparency is greyed out. After setting ANC ON during the call, ANC becomes active with Adaptive value selected. After leaving the call, ANC remains active with Adaptive selected and Transparency stays OFF. User can then toggle between ANC and Transparency modes.
